diagrams.title: Sample Binary Tree for Traversals
diagrams.description: A binary tree with 7 nodes showing root, internal nodes, and leaves

diagrams.title: Complete vs Full vs Perfect Binary Tree
diagrams.description: Three types of binary trees illustrating their differences
elements: Complete: All levels filled except last, nodes left-aligned
Full: Each node has 0 or 2 children
Perfect: All internal nodes have 2 children, all leaves at same level
diagrams.purpose: Visual distinction between tree types for exams

diagrams.title: BST Example with Search Path
diagrams.description: Binary Search Tree showing parent-child value relationships
diagrams.purpose: Understanding BST property and search operation
